author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Three-layer GPU memory safety (MemoryReservation, MemoryGuard with 4 OOM policies, MemoryWatchdog with pressure pause). 1,295 new lines, 84 GPU tests. Solves the 'Steam kills your training' problem via VRAM reservation + budget enforcement + graceful OOM recovery with emergency checkpoint callback.
